charity.heroLead: Donate USDT and more to global programs with transparent milestones (demo). Production requires compliance, custody, and audits.

1.title: Choose a campaign
1.body: Review goals, regions, and progress before you donate.

2.title: Confirm donation
2.body: Enter USDT amount and submit while logged in; demo does not broadcast on-chain.

3.title: Transparency
3.body: Production can show tx hashes, milestones, and third-party audit summaries.

rules.i1: Donations are voluntary—give only what fits your risk tolerance.
rules.i2: Demo data/images are placeholders—not real partners or beneficiaries.
rules.i3: Live flows may require KYC, AML, and local tax compliance.
rules.i4: Network fees or service fees may apply per platform notices.

charity.disclaimer: Demo page; read live terms and privacy before donating.
charity.detailRisk: Risk: digital asset donations are volatile; verify addresses and campaign authenticity. Demo does not move funds on-chain.

flow.confirmLead: Confirm the campaign and amount. Demo updates instantly (no on-chain charge).
flow.confirmWarn: Production depends on real settlement, receipts, and disclosures.
flow.successDesc: Ref {id}. {amount} USDT counted toward “{title}” (demo, not charged).
flow.agree: I understand the risks, donate voluntarily, and know this demo does not charge on-chain.
flow.needAgree: Please check the box to continue

myDonations.title: My donations (demo)
myDonations.hint: Stored only for this browser session—refresh clears the list. Production can use account center or exports.
myDonations.empty: No donations yet. After you donate to an active campaign, entries appear here (newest first).

edu-rural-library.title: Rural library & digital classroom
edu-rural-library.summary: Books and devices for remote schools, plus remote learning content.
edu-rural-library.body:
This initiative narrows the urban–rural digital divide through pooled procurement and local volunteer operations.

Planned quarterly breakdowns cover hardware, connectivity, and teacher training (demo only).

Illustrative copy—not a live fundraising pledge.

disaster-flood-2025.title: Flood emergency humanitarian aid
disaster-flood-2025.summary: Clean water, food packs, and temporary shelter with local partners.
disaster-flood-2025.body:
Rapid logistics matter during floods. We work with registered NGOs to prioritize elders and children.

On-chain donations can speed cross-border settlement; distribution lists would be published in production.

Verify credentials and payout details before donating.

env-reforest.title: Mangrove restoration & carbon pilot
env-reforest.summary: Coastal wetland repair with community jobs and long-term monitoring.
env-reforest.body:
Ecological projects need years of satellite + field monitoring. Funds cover seedlings, labor, and equipment.

Carbon rights follow local law; this demo makes no carbon credit promise.

Small recurring gifts help sustain operations.

children-lunch.title: School lunch program (completed)
children-lunch.summary: One school year of meal subsidies—goal reached and executed.
children-lunch.body:
The campaign hit its target and completed vendor selection and meal plans.

Thank you to all donors. Final reporting is illustrative in demo.

A new cycle may be announced separately.

health-vaccine.title: Primary care cold-chain & education (completed)
health-vaccine.summary: Cold boxes and pamphlets for township clinics—goal reached.
health-vaccine.body:
Funds supported portable cold storage and printed education materials across townships. Monthly receipts would be shared in production.

Medical programs must follow regulator rules.

water-wells.title: Clean water wells & maintenance
water-wells.summary: Village wells plus basic maintenance training for residents.
water-wells.body:
Water projects need hydro surveys and community co-management to avoid idle assets. Phases: survey, build, train, and a one-year maintenance fund.

Donations unlock by milestone in production (demo flow).
